message:
fix: address code review issues in new modules

Bug fixes:
- Rename from_str to parse for SnapshotTrigger and CircuitState
  to avoid shadowing the std::str::FromStr trait method
- Fix from_combined_hash to use split_once for robustness
- Fix get_latest_snapshots_by_provider query to handle timestamp
  ties by using correlated subquery with ORDER BY id DESC

The previous JOIN approach could return duplicate rows if two
snapshots had identical fetched_at timestamps for the same account.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
